subject: feat(mobile): add primary→accent gradient to header app name
body:
Matches glow-props hero heading pattern — bg-gradient-to-r from-primary
to-accent with bg-clip-text. Auto-adapts to every DaisyUI theme since
primary and accent are theme-defined. Monochrome themes (lofi, black)
degrade to solid text gracefully.
